TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Dhimitër Orgocka mhtuw squ kawas te 1936, kinhulan nya ga Colca na Albania, mtzyuaw squ hayyo na ega' ru pgeki' ru pcbaq trang p'ega' uzi, ru wal pgluw squ pzyang balay hopa' lalu' na People's Artist beh Albania qaniy. masuq mqwas raygak lga t'aring pcbaq pgeki' kya squ san pgeki' kya Colca la, ru ki'a wal hmenas min kbhul msyaw kinbalay nya' geki' kya la. qyanux nya 1963 kawas htgan na ryax maki Korçë. tmasot mqwas biru University of Tirana. aring kekong Dhorkë Orgocka pinsqunan si tehok soni. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: *ħimit*r orɣoʦ~ʨka mħtuw s~ɕqu kawas~ɕ te ****, kinħulan nja ɣa ʦ~ʨolʦ~ʨa na alβania, mtzjuaw s~ɕqu ħajjo na eɣaʔ ru pɣekiʔ ru pʦ~ʨβaq traŋ pʔeɣaʔ uzi, ru wal pɣluw s~ɕqu pzjaŋ βalaj ħopaʔ laluʔ na peopleʔs~ɕ artis~ɕt βeħ alβania qanij. mas~ɕuq mqwas~ɕ rajɣak lɣa tʔariŋ pʦ~ʨβaq pɣekiʔ kja s~ɕqu s~ɕan pɣekiʔ kja ʦ~ʨolʦ~ʨa la, ru kiʔa wal ħmenas~ɕ min kβħul ms~ɕjaw kinβalaj njaʔ ɣekiʔ kja la. qjanux nja **** kawas~ɕ ħtɣan na rjax maki kor**. tmas~ɕot mqwas~ɕ βiru uni*ers~ɕitj o* tirana. ariŋ kekoŋ *ħork* orɣoʦ~ʨka pins~ɕqunan s~ɕi teħok s~ɕoni. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
S.FORM: Dhimitër Orgocka mhtuw squ kawas te 1936, kinhulan nya ga Colca na Albania, mtzyuaw squ hayyo na ega' ru pgeki' ru pcbaq trang p'ega' uzi, ru wal pgluw squ pzyang balay hopa' lalu' na People's Artist beh Albania qaniy. masuq mqwas raygak lga t'aring pcbaq pgeki' kya squ san pgeki' kya Colca la, ru ki'a wal hmenas min kbhul msyaw kinbalay nya' geki' kya la. qyanux nya 1963 kawas htgan na ryax maki Korçë. tmasot mqwas biru University of Tirana. aring kekong Dhorkë Orgocka pinsqunan si tehok soni. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: *ħimit*r orɣoʦ~ʨka mħtuw s~ɕqu kawas~ɕ te ****, kinħulan nja ɣa ʦ~ʨolʦ~ʨa na alβania, mtzjuaw s~ɕqu ħajjo na eɣaʔ ru pɣekiʔ ru pʦ~ʨβaq traŋ pʔeɣaʔ uzi, ru wal pɣluw s~ɕqu pzjaŋ βalaj ħopaʔ laluʔ na peopleʔs~ɕ artis~ɕt βeħ alβania qanij. mas~ɕuq mqwas~ɕ rajɣak lɣa tʔariŋ pʦ~ʨβaq pɣekiʔ kja s~ɕqu s~ɕan pɣekiʔ kja ʦ~ʨolʦ~ʨa la, ru kiʔa wal ħmenas~ɕ min kβħul ms~ɕjaw kinβalaj njaʔ ɣekiʔ kja la. qjanux nja **** kawas~ɕ ħtɣan na rjax maki kor**. tmas~ɕot mqwas~ɕ βiru uni*ers~ɕitj o* tirana. ariŋ kekoŋ *ħork* orɣoʦ~ʨka pins~ɕqunan s~ɕi teħok s~ɕoni. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
